Function.Inference: Introductory section ending with a repeat sign |: at bar 2.
First part of the loop body ending with a double barline || at bar 14.
Second part of the loop body ending with a repeat sign :| at bar 22.

Section.Inference: Section A merges a 4-bar accompaniment vamp and an 8-bar main melodic theme.
Section B merges a 4-bar contrasting motif and a 4-bar return to the A theme.
